caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a small bow tie, glasses, and over-ear headphones. Most notably, he wears a large, grey, peaked wig on his head. A professional microphone is positioned in the foreground to his left. To the left and right of the man, on-screen graphics are visible, including a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated, shifting his gaze slightly and adjusting his facial expression while speaking. He appears to be engaged in a conversation or recording a podcast, with the camera maintaining a steady medium shot focused on his upper body.
